SELECT 
  treatment,
  -"G" AS max_dissolution_rate,
  "OmegaAragonite"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY -"G" DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH unsealed_trossulus AS (
  SELECT MAX(-"G") AS max_dissolution
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
),
unsealed_californianus AS (
  SELECT MAX(-"G") AS max_dissolution
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
)
SELECT 
  t.max_dissolution / c.max_dissolution AS factor
FROM unsealed_trossulus t, unsealed_californianus c

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  STDDEV(-"G") AS stddev_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH species_treatment AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
      ELSE 'unsealed'
    END AS seal_status,
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
mean_by_species_seal AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    seal_status,
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_dissolution_rate
  FROM species_treatment
  WHERE species IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY species, seal_status
)
SELECT 
  u.species,
  u.mean_dissolution_rate - COALESCE(s.mean_dissolution_rate, 0) AS difference_unsealed_minus_sealed
FROM mean_by_species_seal u
LEFT JOIN mean_by_species_seal s 
  ON u.species = s.species AND s.seal_status = 'sealed'
WHERE u.seal_status = 'unsealed'
ORDER BY u.species

SELECT 
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN "shell.wt" END) / 
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN "shell.wt" END) AS weight_ratio
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  REGR_SLOPE("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS slope,
  CORR("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS pearson_correlation
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN REPLACE("treatment", '.painted', '')
    ELSE "treatment"
  END AS species,
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
    ELSE 'unsealed'
  END AS sealing,
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN REPLACE("treatment", '.painted', '')
    ELSE "treatment"
  END,
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
    ELSE 'unsealed'
  END

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  AVG("shell.wt") AS mean_shell_weight,
  STDDEV("shell.wt") AS stddev_shell_weight
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  1.96 * STDDEV(-"G") / SQRT(COUNT(*)) AS ci_half_width
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" as dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND ("treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' OR "treatment" = 'shell.californianus')
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN dissolution_rate END) as mean_trossulus,
    AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN dissolution_rate END) as mean_californianus,
    VAR_SAMP(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN dissolution_rate END) as var_trossulus,
    VAR_SAMP(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN dissolution_rate END) as var_californianus,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 1 END) as n_trossulus,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 1 END) as n_californianus
  FROM filtered_data
)
SELECT
  (mean_trossulus - mean_californianus) / 
  SQRT(((n_trossulus - 1) * var_trossulus + (n_californianus - 1) * var_californianus) / 
       (n_trossulus + n_californianus - 2)) as cohens_d
FROM stats

WITH unsealed_data AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_val,
    VARIANCE(dissolution_rate) AS var_val,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM unsealed_data
  GROUP BY species
),
trossulus AS (
  SELECT mean_val AS mean1, var_val AS var1, n AS n1
  FROM stats
  WHERE species = 'trossulus'
),
californianus AS (
  SELECT mean_val AS mean2, var_val AS var2, n AS n2
  FROM stats
  WHERE species = 'californianus'
)
SELECT 
  (t.mean1 - c.mean2) / SQRT((t.var1 / t.n1) + (c.var2 / c.n2)) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM trossulus t
CROSS JOIN californianus c

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND ("treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' OR "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted')
),
unsealed_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_unsealed,
    STDDEV_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS sd_unsealed,
    COUNT(*) AS n_unsealed
  FROM filtered_data
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
),
sealed_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_sealed,
    STDDEV_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS sd_sealed,
    COUNT(*) AS n_sealed
  FROM filtered_data
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted'
)
SELECT 
  (u.mean_unsealed - s.mean_sealed) / 
  SQRT(((u.n_unsealed - 1) * POWER(u.sd_unsealed, 2) + (s.n_sealed - 1) * POWER(s.sd_sealed, 2)) / 
       (u.n_unsealed + s.n_sealed - 2)) AS cohens_d
FROM unsealed_stats u, sealed_stats s

WITH unsealed AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
sealed AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus.painted'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
unsealed_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_unsealed,
    VAR_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS var_unsealed,
    COUNT(*) AS n_unsealed
  FROM unsealed
),
sealed_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_sealed,
    VAR_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS var_sealed,
    COUNT(*) AS n_sealed
  FROM sealed
)
SELECT 
  (u.mean_unsealed - s.mean_sealed) / 
  SQRT((u.var_unsealed / u.n_unsealed) + (s.var_sealed / s.n_sealed)) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM unsealed_stats u, sealed_stats s

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY -"G") AS median_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH unsealed_trossulus AS (
  SELECT AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
),
unsealed_californianus AS (
  SELECT AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
)
SELECT 
  t.mean_dissolution / c.mean_dissolution AS ratio
FROM unsealed_trossulus t, unsealed_californianus c

SELECT 
  WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) AS bin_number,
  0 + (WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) - 1) * 2.0 AS bin_lower,
  0 + WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) * 2.0 AS bin_upper,
  COUNT(*) AS incubation_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5)
ORDER BY bin_number

WITH treatment_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    AVG("G") AS mean_g,
    STDDEV("G") AS sd_g
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
z_scores AS (
  SELECT 
    a."shell.number",
    a."treatment",
    a."G",
    CASE 
      WHEN ts.sd_g > 0 THEN (a."G" - ts.mean_g) / ts.sd_g
      ELSE NULL
    END AS z_score
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" a
  JOIN treatment_stats ts ON a."treatment" = ts."treatment"
  WHERE a."G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "G",
  z_score
FROM z_scores
WHERE z_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY z_score DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "OmegaAragonite",
  "G",
  AVG("G") OVER (ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite"

WITH ranked_shells AS (
  SELECT 
    "shell.number",
    "treatment",
    "G",
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY "G") AS percentile_rank
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "G",
  percentile_rank
FROM ranked_shells
ORDER BY percentile_rank DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT (SUM(POWER(-"G" - AVG(-"G") OVER (), 3)) / COUNT(*)) / POWER(STDDEV_POP(-"G"), 3) AS skewness
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" 
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' 
  AND "G" > (
    SELECT MAX("G") 
    FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" 
    WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
  )

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
    AND "treatment" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS group_mean,
    VARIANCE(dissolution_rate) AS group_var
  FROM filtered_data
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
overall_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS grand_mean,
    COUNT(*) AS total_n,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "treatment") AS k
  FROM filtered_data
),
ss_between AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(g.n * POWER(g.group_mean - o.grand_mean, 2)) AS ss_b,
    o.k - 1 AS df_between
  FROM group_stats g
  CROSS JOIN overall_stats o
  GROUP BY o.k
),
ss_within AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM((g.n - 1) * g.group_var) AS ss_w,
    o.total_n - o.k AS df_within
  FROM group_stats g
  CROSS JOIN overall_stats o
  GROUP BY o.total_n, o.k
)
SELECT 
  (b.ss_b / b.df_between) / (w.ss_w / w.df_within) AS f_statistic,
  b.df_between,
  w.df_within
FROM ss_between b
CROSS JOIN ss_within w

SELECT COUNT(*) AS shell_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT treatment, COUNT(*) as shell_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT

    MAX("OmegaAragonite") AS max_omega_aragonite
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  COUNT(DISTINCT "shell.number") AS distinct_shell_numbers,
  MIN("shell.number") AS min_shell_number,

SELECT 
  MIN("G") AS min_G,
  MAX("G") AS max_G,

SELECT 
  MIN("duration") AS min_duration,

FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1) AS shells_with_omega_less_than_1,
  COUNT(*) AS total_shells
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

      WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.californianus%' THEN 1

  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1

stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) as n,
    AVG(log_dissolution_rate) as y_mean,
    AVG("OmegaAragonite") as x1_mean,
    AVG(sealed) as x2_mean,
    AVG(californianus) as x3_mean,
    AVG(sealed * californianus) as x4_mean
  FROM filtered_data
),
centered AS (
  SELECT
    log_dissolution_rate - y_mean as y,
    "OmegaAragonite" - x1_mean as x1,
    sealed - x2_mean as x2,
    californianus - x3_mean as x3,
    (sealed * californianus) - x4_mean as x4
  FROM filtered_data, stats
),
matrix_elements AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(x1 * x1) as x1x1,
    SUM(x1 * x2) as x1x2,
    SUM(x1 * x3) as x1x3,

    SUM(x2 * x2) as x2x2,
    SUM(x2 * x3) as x2x3,
    SUM(x2 * x4) as x2x4,
    SUM(x3 * x3) as x3x3,
    SUM(x3 * x4) as x3x4,
    SUM(x4 * x4) as x4x4,
    SUM(x1 * y) as x1y,
    SUM(x2 * y) as x2y,
    SUM(x3 * y) as x3y,
    SUM(x4 * y) as x4y,
    SUM(y * y) as yy
  FROM centered

regression AS (

     x1x2 * (x1x2 * x3x3 * x4x4 - x1x2 * x3x4 * x3x4 - x1x3 * x2x3 * x4x4 + x1x3 * x2x4 * x3x4 + x1x4 * x2x3 * x3x4 - x1x4 * x2x4 * x3x3) +
     x1x3 * (x1x2 * x2x3 * x4x4 - x1x2 * x2x4 * x3x4

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "G",
    "OmegaAragonite",
    "treatment",
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%painted%' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS sealed
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0
),
regression_data AS (
  SELECT 
    LN(-1 * "G") AS log_neg_G,
    "OmegaAragonite",
    CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS species_californianus,
    sealed,
    CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END * sealed AS interaction
  FROM filtered_data
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(log_neg_G) AS y_mean,
    AVG("OmegaAragonite") AS x1_mean,
    AVG(species_californianus) AS x2_mean,
    AVG(sealed) AS x3_mean,
    AVG(interaction) AS x4_mean,
    REGR_SLOPE(log_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS slope_omega,
    REGR_INTERCEPT(log_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS simple_intercept
  FROM regression_data
)
SELECT 
  'intercept' AS coefficient_name,
  s.simple_intercept - 
    COALESCE(REGR_SLOPE(r.log_neg_G, r.species_californianus), 0) * s.x2_mean -
    COALESCE(REGR_SLOPE(r.log_neg_G, r.sealed), 0) * s.x3_mean -
    COALESCE(REGR_SLOPE(r.log_neg_G, r.interaction), 0) * s.x4_mean AS coefficient_value
FROM regression_data r, stats s
GROUP BY s.simple_intercept, s.x2_mean, s.x3_mean, s.x4_mean
UNION ALL
SELECT 'species_californianus', REGR_SLOPE(log_neg_G, species_californianus) FROM regression_data
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sealed', REGR_SLOPE(log_neg_G, sealed) FROM regression_data
UNION ALL
SELECT 'interaction', REGR_SLOPE(log_neg_G, interaction) FROM regression_data

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  COUNT("shell.length") AS number_of_shells,
  AVG("shell.length") AS mean_length,
  STDDEV("shell.length") AS stddev_length
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "shell.length" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  AVG("duration") AS mean_duration,
  STDDEV("duration") AS stddev_duration
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH unsealed_shells AS (
  SELECT 
    "G"
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" > 1
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as n,
    AVG("G") as mean_g,
    STDDEV_SAMP("G") as sd_g
  FROM unsealed_shells
)
SELECT 
  n as shell_count,
  mean_g,
  mean_g - 1.96 * sd_g / SQRT(n) as ci_lower,
  mean_g + 1.96 * sd_g / SQRT(n) as ci_upper
FROM stats

SELECT 
    MIN("Irrigation_times") AS min_irrigations,
    MAX("Irrigation_times") AS max_irrigations
FROM "2023_crop_data"

WITH height_data AS (
  SELECT "Crop", 50 AS days, "Average_height_50" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_50" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 60, "Average_height_60" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_60" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 70, "Average_height_70" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_70" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 80, "Average_height_80" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_80" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 90, "Average_height_90" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_90" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 100, "Average_height_100" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 110, "Average_height_110" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_110" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 120, "Average_height_120" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_120" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 130, "Average_height_130" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_130" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "Crop", 140, "Average_height_140" FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_140" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "Crop",
  (COUNT(*) * SUM(days * height) - SUM(days) * SUM(height)) / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(*) * SUM(days * days) - SUM(days) * SUM(days), 0) AS ols_slope,
  COUNT(*) AS n_observations
FROM height_data
GROUP BY "Crop"
ORDER BY "Crop"

SELECT 
  "Crop",
  "Site",
  AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival,
  COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Survival" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"
ORDER BY mean_survival DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") as mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IN ('black pea', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
sites_with_both AS (
  SELECT "Site"
  FROM site_crop_survival
  GROUP BY "Site"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") = 2
),
comparison AS (
  SELECT 
    swb."Site",
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'black pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) as black_pea_survival,
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'green pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) as green_pea_survival
  FROM sites_with_both swb
  JOIN site_crop_survival scs ON swb."Site" = scs."Site"
  GROUP BY swb."Site"
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_sites,
  SUM(CASE WHEN black_pea_survival > green_pea_survival THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sites_black_exceeds_green
FROM comparison

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Site" IN ('Kiamo', 'Kibber', 'Tashigang')
    AND "Crop" IN ('barley', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
barley_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    mean_survival AS barley_mean_survival
  FROM site_crop_survival
  WHERE "Crop" = 'barley'
),
green_pea_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",

  FROM site_crop_survival
  WHERE "Crop" = 'green pea'
)
SELECT

  g.green_pea_mean_survival
FROM barley_survival b

SELECT 
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_50") AS percentile_25th,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_50") AS percentile_50th,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_50") AS percentile_75th,
  COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Average_height_50" IS NOT NULL

WITH plot_max_heights AS (
  SELECT 
    GREATEST(
      COALESCE("Average_height_50", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_60", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_70", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_80", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_90", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_100", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_110", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_120", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_130", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_140", 0)
    ) AS max_height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
),
binned_plots AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN max_height < 24 THEN '0-24'
      WHEN max_height < 48 THEN '24-48'
      WHEN max_height < 72 THEN '48-72'
      WHEN max_height < 96 THEN '72-96'
      WHEN max_height < 120 THEN '96-120'
      ELSE '120+'
    END AS bin,
    CASE 
      WHEN max_height < 24 THEN 1
      WHEN max_height < 48 THEN 2
      WHEN max_height < 72 THEN 3
      WHEN max_height < 96 THEN 4
      WHEN max_height < 120 THEN 5
      ELSE 6
    END AS bin_order
  FROM plot_max_heights
)
SELECT 
  bin,
  COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM binned_plots
GROUP BY bin, bin_order
ORDER BY bin_order

WITH plot_averages AS (
  SELECT 
    "Sno",
    "Site",
    "Plot_no",
    ("Average_height_50" + "Average_height_60" + "Average_height_70" + 
     "Average_height_80" + "Average_height_90" + "Average_height_100" + 
     "Average_height_110" + "Average_height_120" + "Average_height_130" + 
     "Average_height_140") / 10.0 AS mean_stem_height,
    ("Average_leaves_40" + "Average_leaves_50" + "Average_leaves_60" + 
     "Average_leaves_70" + "Average_leaves_80" + "Average_leaves_90" + 
     "Average_leaves_100" + "Average_leaves_110" + "Average_leaves_120") / 9.0 AS mean_leaf_count
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
    AND "Average_height_50" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_leaves_40" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  corr(mean_stem_height, mean_leaf_count) AS pearson_correlation,
  count(*) AS number_of_plots
FROM plot_averages
WHERE mean_stem_height IS NOT NULL 
  AND mean_leaf_count IS NOT NULL

WITH black_pea_plots AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Plot_no",
    ("Average_height_50" + "Average_height_60" + "Average_height_70" + 
     "Average_height_80" + "Average_height_90" + "Average_height_100" + 
     "Average_height_110" + "Average_height_120" + "Average_height_130" + 
     "Average_height_140") / 10.0 AS mean_height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
    AND "Average_height_50" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_60" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_70" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_80" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_90" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_110" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_120" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_130" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_140" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(mean_height) AS overall_mean,
    STDDEV_SAMP(mean_height) AS overall_stddev
  FROM black_pea_plots
)
SELECT 
  bp."Site",
  bp."Plot_no",
  bp.mean_height,
  (bp.mean_height - s.overall_mean) / s.overall_stddev AS z_score
FROM black_pea_plots bp
CROSS JOIN stats s
ORDER BY bp."Site", bp."Plot_no"

WITH matrix_elements AS (
  SELECT 
    row_number() OVER () as row_num,
    col_1, col_2, col_3, col_4, col_5, col_6, col_7, col_8, col_9,
    col_10, col_11, col_12, col_13, col_14, col_15, col_16, col_17, col_18
  FROM "Pea_n18_NC_066583"
),
unpivoted AS (
  SELECT row_num as i, 1 as j, col_1 as value FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 2, col_2 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 3, col_3 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 4, col_4 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 5, col_5 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 6, col_6 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 7, col_7 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 8, col_8 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 9, col_9 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 10, col_10 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 11, col_11 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 12, col_12 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 13, col_13 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 14, col_14 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 15, col_15 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 16, col_16 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 17, col_17 FROM matrix_elements
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 18, col_18 FROM matrix_elements
)
SELECT MAX(ABS(a.value - b.value)) as max_asymmetry
FROM unpivoted a
JOIN unpivoted b ON a.i = b.j AND a.j = b.i
WHERE a.i < a.j

pre_infection_titers AS (

    ON e."Subject.ID" = prs."Subject.ID"

    (CASE WHEN "vaccine_1_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN "vaccine_2_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +

     CASE WHEN "vaccine_4_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +

WITH dose3_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "Subject.ID",
    "conc.ug_ml",
    "breakthru",
    "COVID_pos_before_sample"
  FROM "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE "time" = 'post-dose 3'
    AND "COVID_pos_before_sample" = 0
    AND "conc.ug_ml" IS NOT NULL
    AND "breakthru" IS NOT NULL
),
breakthrough_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "breakthru",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    AVG("conc.ug_ml") as mean_conc,
    STDDEV_SAMP("conc.ug_ml") as sd_conc,
    VAR_SAMP("conc.ug_ml") as var_conc
  FROM dose3_data
  GROUP BY "breakthru"
),
welch_components AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 1 THEN mean_conc END) as mean_bt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 0 THEN mean_conc END) as mean_no_bt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 1 THEN var_conc END) as var_bt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 0 THEN var_conc END) as var_no_bt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 1 THEN n END) as n_bt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 0 THEN n END) as n_no_bt
  FROM breakthrough_stats
)
SELECT 
  (mean_bt - mean_no_bt) / SQRT((var_bt / n_bt) + (var_no_bt / n_no_bt)) as welch_t_statistic
FROM welch_components

WITH breakthrough_fatigue AS (
  SELECT 
    i."new_group",
    i."fatigue"
  FROM "inf_public" i
  WHERE i."infection_timing" = 'Breakthrough'
    AND i."fatigue" IS NOT NULL
),
contingency_table AS (
  SELECT 
    "new_group",
    "fatigue",
    COUNT(*) as observed
  FROM breakthrough_fatigue
  GROUP BY "new_group", "fatigue"
),
row_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "new_group",
    SUM(observed) as row_total
  FROM contingency_table
  GROUP BY "new_group"
),
col_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "fatigue",
    SUM(observed) as col_total
  FROM contingency_table
  GROUP BY "fatigue"
),
grand_total AS (
  SELECT SUM(observed) as n
  FROM contingency_table
),
expected_values AS (
  SELECT 
    ct."new_group",
    ct."fatigue",
    ct.observed,
    (rt.row_total * colt.col_total * 1.0 / gt.n) as expected
  FROM contingency_table ct
  JOIN row_totals rt ON ct."new_group" = rt."new_group"
  JOIN col_totals colt ON ct."fatigue" = colt."fatigue"
  CROSS JOIN grand_total gt
)
SELECT 
  SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) as chi_square_statistic
FROM expected_values

ranked_variants AS (

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    "total",
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "total") as rank_val
  FROM "raw_group_size"
  WHERE "total" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    COUNT(*) as n_i,
    SUM(rank_val) as R_i,
    SUM(rank_val * rank_val) as R_i_squared
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "population"
),
overall_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as N,
    SUM(n_i) as total_n
  FROM group_stats
)
SELECT 
  (12.0 / (o.N * (o.N + 1))) * SUM(g.R_i * g.R_i / g.n_i) - 3 * (o.N + 1) as kruskal_wallis_chi_square
FROM group_stats g
CROSS JOIN overall_stats o

WITH female_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    "size",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "size") AS rank
  FROM "raw_body_length"
  WHERE "sex" = 'Female'
),
rank_sums AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum,
    SUM(rank * rank) / COUNT(*) AS rank_sum_sq_over_n
  FROM female_data
  GROUP BY "population"
),
totals AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_n,
    SUM(rank_sum_sq_over_n) AS sum_rank_sq_over_n
  FROM rank_sums
)
SELECT 
  (12.0 / (total_n * (total_n + 1))) * sum_rank_sq_over_n - 3 * (total_n + 1) AS kruskal_wallis_chi_square
FROM totals

WITH male_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    "size",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "size") AS rank
  FROM "raw_body_length"
  WHERE "sex" = 'Male'
),
rank_sums AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum,
    SUM(rank * rank) / COUNT(*) AS rank_sum_sq_over_n
  FROM male_data
  GROUP BY "population"
),
totals AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_n,
    SUM(rank_sum_sq_over_n) AS sum_rank_sq_over_n
  FROM rank_sums
)
SELECT 
  (12.0 / (total_n * (total_n + 1))) * sum_rank_sq_over_n - 3 * (total_n + 1) AS kruskal_wallis_chi_square
FROM totals

SELECT
  AVG(agonism_per_hour) AS mean_agonism_rate_per_hour,
  AVG(agonism_per_hour) - 1.96 * (STDDEV(agonism_per_hour) / SQRT(COUNT(*))) AS ci_lower,
  AVG(agonism_per_hour) + 1.96 * (STDDEV(agonism_per_hour) / SQRT(COUNT(*))) AS ci_upper
FROM agonism_rates

WITH body_length_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "species",
    AVG("size") AS mean_body_length
  FROM "raw_body_length"
  GROUP BY "species"
),
group_size_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "species",
    AVG("total") AS mean_aggregation_size
  FROM "raw_group_size"
  GROUP BY "species"
),
agonism_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "species",
    AVG(("num_agon" / "video_duration") * 3600) AS mean_male_male_agonism_rate_per_hour
  FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
  WHERE "sex" = 'Male'
    AND "video_duration" > 0
  GROUP BY "species"
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(bl."species", gs."species", ag."species") AS species,
  bl.mean_body_length,
  gs.mean_aggregation_size,
  ag.mean_male_male_agonism_rate_per_hour
FROM body_length_stats bl
FULL OUTER JOIN group_size_stats gs ON bl."species" = gs."species"
FULL OUTER JOIN agonism_stats ag ON COALESCE(bl."species", gs."species") = ag."species"
ORDER BY species

SELECT 
  "population",
  AVG(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN "size" END) - AVG(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN "size" END) AS sexual_size_dimorphism
FROM "raw_body_length"
GROUP BY "population"

WITH species_in_group_size AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "species"
  FROM "raw_group_size"
),
species_in_body_length AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "species"
  FROM "raw_body_length"
),
species_in_behaviour AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "species"
  FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
),
all_species AS (
  SELECT "species" FROM species_in_group_size
  UNION
  SELECT "species" FROM species_in_body_length
  UNION
  SELECT "species" FROM species_in_behaviour
)
SELECT 
  a."species",
  CASE WHEN gs."species" IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS in_group_size,
  CASE WHEN bl."species" IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS in_body_length,
  CASE WHEN bd."species" IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS in_behaviour,
  CASE WHEN gs."species" IS NOT NULL AND bl."species" IS NOT NULL AND bd."species" IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS in_all_three
FROM all_species a
LEFT JOIN species_in_group_size gs ON a."species" = gs."species"
LEFT JOIN species_in_body_length bl ON a."species" = bl."species"
LEFT JOIN species_in_behaviour bd ON a."species" = bd."species"
ORDER BY a."species"

  COUNT(*) AS number_of_trials
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
GROUP BY "stim"

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lat_mov") AS median_movement_latency
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
WHERE "stim" = 'visual'

SELECT

SELECT

  COUNT(*) AS total_trials,

WITH contingency AS (
  SELECT 
    "stimulus",
    "call01",
    COUNT(*) as observed
  FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
  GROUP BY "stimulus", "call01"
),
row_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "stimulus",
    SUM(observed) as row_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "stimulus"
),
col_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "call01",
    SUM(observed) as col_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "call01"
),
grand_total AS (
  SELECT SUM(observed) as n
  FROM contingency
),
expected AS (
  SELECT 
    c."stimulus",
    c."call01",
    c.observed,
    (r.row_total * col.col_total)::double precision / g.n as expected
  FROM contingency c
  JOIN row_totals r ON c."stimulus" = r."stimulus"
  JOIN col_totals col ON c."call01" = col."call01"
  CROSS JOIN grand_total g
)
SELECT 
  SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) as chi_square_statistic
FROM expected

WITH multimodal_responders AS (
  SELECT 
    "ind",
    "condition",
    "lat_mov",
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "condition") AS condition_percentile_rank,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "condition") AS row_num
  FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
  WHERE "stim" = 'multimodal' 
    AND "mov_status" = 2
)
SELECT
  "ind",
  "condition",
  "lat_mov",
  condition_percentile_rank,
  AVG("lat_mov") OVER (
    ORDER BY "condition" 
    ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS moving_avg_lat_mov
FROM multimodal_responders
ORDER BY "condition"

WITH joined AS (
  SELECT 
    e."call01",
    e."vsig01",
    l."call_status",
    l."vs_status"
  FROM "env_0_1_fixed" e
  INNER JOIN "lat_surv_females_fixed" l
    ON e."ind" = l."ind" 
    AND e."stimulus" = l."stim"
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE 
    WHEN ("call01" = 1 AND "call_status" = 1) OR ("call01" = 0 AND "call_status" = 2) 
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END) AS acoustic_disagreements,
  SUM(CASE 
    WHEN ("vsig01" = 1 AND "vs_status" = 1) OR ("vsig01" = 0 AND "vs_status" = 2) 
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END) AS visual_disagreements
FROM joined

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)", "sex") as rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental' 
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    SUM(rank) as rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
overall_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(n) as total_n
  FROM group_stats
),
mann_whitney AS (
  SELECT 
    f.n as n_female,
    m.n as n_male,
    f.rank_sum as rank_sum_female,
    m.rank_sum as rank_sum_male,
    f.rank_sum - (f.n * (f.n + 1.0) / 2.0) as U_female,
    m.rank_sum - (m.n * (m.n + 1.0) / 2.0) as U_male,
    (f.n * m.n) / 2.0 as mean_U,
    SQRT((f.n * m.n * (f.n + m.n + 1.0)) / 12.0) as sd_U
  FROM group_stats f
  CROSS JOIN group_stats m
  WHERE f."sex" = 'female' AND m."sex" = 'male'
)
SELECT 
  n_female,
  n_male,
  (LEAST(U_female, U_male) - mean_U) / NULLIF(sd_U, 0) as z_statistic
FROM mann_whitney

WITH adult_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)" as perch_height
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
),
male_data AS (
  SELECT perch_height FROM adult_data WHERE "sex" = 'male'
),
female_data AS (
  SELECT perch_height FROM adult_data WHERE "sex" = 'female'
),
combined_ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    perch_height,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY perch_height, RANDOM()) as rank
  FROM adult_data
),
sample_sizes AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') as n_male,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') as n_female
  FROM adult_data
),
rank_sums AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(rank) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') as r_male,
    SUM(rank) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') as r_female
  FROM combined_ranked
)
SELECT
  s.n_male,
  s.n_female,
  (r.r_male - s.n_male * (s.n_male + 1.0) / 2.0) as u_male,
  (r.r_male - s.n_male * (s.n_male + 1.0) / 2.0 - s.n_male * s.n_female / 2.0) / 
    SQRT(s.n_male * s.n_female * (s.n_male + s.n_female + 1.0) / 12.0) as z_statistic
FROM sample_sizes s, rank_sums r

WITH adult_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Vegetation density"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "Vegetation density" IS NOT NULL
),
contingency AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Vegetation density",
    COUNT(*) as observed
  FROM adult_data
  GROUP BY "sex", "Vegetation density"
),
row_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    SUM(observed) as row_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
col_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "Vegetation density",
    SUM(observed) as col_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "Vegetation density"
),
grand_total AS (
  SELECT SUM(observed) as n FROM contingency
),
expected AS (
  SELECT 
    c."sex",
    c."Vegetation density",
    c.observed,
    (r.row_total * col.col_total * 1.0 / g.n) as expected
  FROM contingency c
  JOIN row_totals r ON c."sex" = r."sex"
  JOIN col_totals col ON c."Vegetation density" = col."Vegetation density"
  CROSS JOIN grand_total g
)
SELECT 
  SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) as chi_square_statistic
FROM expected

WITH filtered_data AS (

contingency AS (

),
row_totals AS (

col_totals AS (

grand_total AS (

),
expected_values AS (
  SELECT 
    c."sex",
    c."Vegetation type",
    c.observed,
    (r.row_total * col.col_total * 1.0 / g.n) as expected
  FROM contingency c

  JOIN col_totals col ON c."Vegetation type" = col."Vegetation type"
  CROSS JOIN grand_total g

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    "Distance from nearest water (m)",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Distance from nearest water (m)", "age") as rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "age" IN ('adult', 'subadult')
    AND "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT
    "age",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    SUM(rank) as rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "age"
),
mann_whitney AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'adult' THEN n END) as n1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'subadult' THEN n END) as n2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'adult' THEN rank_sum END) as r1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'subadult' THEN rank_sum END) as r2
  FROM group_stats
)
SELECT
  n1 as adult_sample_size,
  n2 as subadult_sample_size,
  (u1 - (n1 * n2 / 2.0)) / SQRT(n1 * n2 * (n1 + n2 + 1) / 12.0) as mann_whitney_z
FROM (
  SELECT
    n1,
    n2,
    r1 - (n1 * (n1 + 1) / 2.0) as u1
  FROM mann_whitney
) subquery

SELECT 
  "age",
  "sex",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS median_perch_height
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
  AND "age" IS NOT NULL
  AND "sex" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "age", "sex"
ORDER BY "age", "sex"

WITH used_plots AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    "Tree height (cm)"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "age" IN ('adult', 'subadult')
    AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    AVG("Tree height (cm)") as mean,
    STDDEV_SAMP("Tree height (cm)") as sd,
    VARIANCE("Tree height (cm)") as var
  FROM used_plots
  GROUP BY "age"
),
adult_stats AS (
  SELECT mean as mean_adult, sd as sd_adult, var as var_adult, n as n_adult
  FROM group_stats
  WHERE "age" = 'adult'
),
subadult_stats AS (
  SELECT mean as mean_subadult, sd as sd_subadult, var as var_subadult, n as n_subadult
  FROM group_stats
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult'
)
SELECT 
  a.mean_adult,
  s.mean_subadult,
  (a.mean_adult - s.mean_subadult) / SQRT((a.sd_adult^2 + s.sd_subadult^2) / 2) as cohens_d,
  (a.mean_adult - s.mean_subadult) / SQRT((a.var_adult / a.n_adult) + (s.var_subadult / s.n_subadult)) as welch_t_statistic
FROM adult_stats a, subadult_stats s

SELECT 
  "sex",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Light intensity (Lux)") AS median_light_intensity,
  AVG("Light intensity (Lux)") AS mean_light_intensity
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
  AND "plot" = 'experimental'
  AND "Light intensity (Lux)" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "sex"
HAVING "sex" IN ('male', 'female')

WITH juvenile_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Rock height (cm)" as rock_height
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult' 
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
stats_by_sex AS (
  SELECT
    "sex",
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rock_height) as median_rock_height,
    AVG(rock_height) as mean_rock_height,
    STDDEV_SAMP(rock_height) as sd_rock_height,
    COUNT(*) as n
  FROM juvenile_data
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
cohens_d_calc AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN median_rock_height END) as male_median,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN median_rock_height END) as female_median,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN mean_rock_height END) as male_mean,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN mean_rock_height END) as female_mean,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN sd_rock_height END) as male_sd,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN sd_rock_height END) as female_sd,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN n END) as male_n,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN n END) as female_n
  FROM stats_by_sex
)
SELECT
  male_median,
  female_median,
  (male_mean - female_mean) / 
    SQRT(((male_n - 1) * POWER(male_sd, 2) + (female_n - 1) * POWER(female_sd, 2)) / 
         (male_n + female_n - 2)) as cohens_d
FROM cohens_d_calc

SELECT 
  "Vegetation type",
  SUM(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_count,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    THEN SUM(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / 
         SUM(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
    ELSE NULL 
  END AS use_vs_availability_ratio
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "sex" = 'male' 
  AND "age" = 'subadult'
  AND "Vegetation type" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Vegetation type"
ORDER BY "Vegetation type"

SELECT 
  "Vegetation density",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') AS used_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'random') AS available_count,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'random') > 0 
    THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental')::numeric / COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'random')::numeric
    ELSE NULL 
  END AS use_vs_availability_ratio
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'adult'
GROUP BY "Vegetation density"
ORDER BY "Vegetation density"

SELECT 
  'All plots' AS dataset,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS n_complete_pairs,
  CORR("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS pearson_correlation
FROM "Sheet2"
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Used plots only' AS dataset,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS n_complete_pairs,
  CORR("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS pearson_correlation
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'

SELECT 
  regr_slope("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS slope,
  regr_intercept("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS intercept,
  regr_r2("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS r_squared,
  corr("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS pearson_correlation
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL 
  AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL

WITH plot_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "plot",
    AVG("Tree height (cm)") AS mean_tree_height,
    STDDEV_SAMP("Tree height (cm)") AS sd_tree_height,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "plot"
),
pooled_sd AS (
  SELECT 
    SQRT(
      (SUM((n - 1) * POWER(sd_tree_height, 2))) / 
      (SUM(n) - 2)
    ) AS pooled_stddev
  FROM plot_stats
),
means AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN mean_tree_height END) AS experimental_mean,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'random' THEN mean_tree_height END) AS random_mean
  FROM plot_stats
)
SELECT 
  m.experimental_mean AS used_plot_mean_tree_height,
  m.random_mean AS random_plot_mean_tree_height,
  (m.experimental_mean - m.random_mean) / p.pooled_stddev AS cohens_d
FROM means m
CROSS JOIN pooled_sd p

SELECT 
  (SUM(POWER("Perch height (cm)" - avg_val, 3)) / COUNT(*)) / POWER(STDDEV_POP("Perch height (cm)"), 3) AS skewness,
  (SUM(POWER("Perch height (cm)" - avg_val, 4)) / COUNT(*)) / POWER(STDDEV_POP("Perch height (cm)"), 4) - 3 AS excess_kurtosis
FROM "Sheet2"
CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG("Perch height (cm)") AS avg_val FROM "Sheet2" WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS avg_table
WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') as experimental_plots,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'random') as random_plots
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_observations,
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Individual number") AS distinct_individuals,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT "Individual number") AS recaptures
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_distance_water,
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Distance from nearest road (m)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_distance_road,
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Light intensity (Lux)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_light_intensity,
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Rock height (cm)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_rock_height,
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Rock size (cm)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_rock_size
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT 
  "Vegetation type",
  "Vegetation coverage",
  "Vegetation density",
  "Substrate status",
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "Sheet2"
GROUP BY 
  "Vegetation type",

SELECT 
  "MumCode",
  AVG("lEPG") AS mean_burden,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG("lEPG") DESC) AS rank
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "MumCode" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "MumCode"
ORDER BY mean_burden DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH yearly_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Year",
    AVG("Survived.mod") AS survival_rate,
    COUNT(*) AS sample_size
  FROM (
    SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod" FROM "strong_df"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod" FROM "fluke_df"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "Year", "Survived.mod" FROM "ecg_df"
  ) AS combined
  WHERE "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Year"
)
SELECT 
  "Year",
  survival_rate,
  sample_size,
  AVG(survival_rate) OVER (
    ORDER BY "Year" 
    ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS three_year_moving_avg
FROM yearly_survival
ORDER BY "Year"

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_no_match

WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM "fluke_df" f
  WHERE f."Name" = s."Name"
    AND f."Year" = s."Year"
    AND f."Season" = s."Season"
)

SELECT *

  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "ecg_df"
  UNION

  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "adult_ecg_df"
) AS combined_deer

WITH matched_strong_fluke AS (
  SELECT 
    s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG,
    f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  INNER JOIN "fluke_df" f 
    ON s."Name" = f."Name" 
    AND s."Year" = f."Year" 
    AND s."Season" = f."Season"
  WHERE s."lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND f."lEPG" IS NOT NULL
),
matched_strong_ecg AS (
  SELECT 
    s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG,
    e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  INNER JOIN "ecg_df" e 
    ON s."Name" = e."Name" 
    AND s."Year" = e."Year" 
    AND s."Season" = e."Season"
  WHERE s."lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND e."lEPG" IS NOT NULL
),
matched_fluke_ecg AS (
  SELECT 
    f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG,
    e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "fluke_df" f
  INNER JOIN "ecg_df" e 
    ON f."Name" = e."Name" 
    AND f."Year" = e."Year" 
    AND f."Season" = e."Season"
  WHERE f."lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND e."lEPG" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  'Strongyle vs Fluke' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(strong_lEPG, fluke_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_strong_fluke
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Strongyle vs E.cervi' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(strong_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_strong_ecg
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Fluke vs E.cervi' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(fluke_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_fluke_ecg

SELECT

  CORR("FROH", "lEPG") AS pearson_correlation,
  REGR_SLOPE("lEPG", "FROH") AS regression_slope
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "AgeCat" IN ('C', 'Y')
GROUP BY "AgeCat"
ORDER BY "AgeCat"
